name: visual-review
description: Produce an interactive, self-contained HTML code review from a git diff. Use when the user asks to visual-review, /visual-review, review this diff/branch/PR as a visual report, make an interactive code review, or wants review findings as a browsable HTML dashboard instead of inline text. Grounds itself in the repo's own conventions first, then runs a multi-lens parallel review with adversarial verification, and writes an annotatable .html dashboard that auto-opens. Read-only on source — only writes the .html artifact.
